title: Himar Clan
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Himar Clan''' was a clan of [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'leks]] who had [[Cherit]] killed by [[Jaing Skirata]] for his mistreatment of Twi'lek dancers.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]'' {{1stm}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
